# Al Haya Cleaning Services
# Professional Cleaning Services in Dubai and Across UAE

> Website: https://servedubai.com
> Business Name: Al Haya Cleaning Services
> Contact: +971-54-719-9189
> Email: info@servedubai.com

## Services Offered
- Sofa Deep Cleaning & Shampooing
- Carpet Cleaning & Shampooing
- Mattress Deep Cleaning
- Curtain Cleaning
- Car Interior Detailing
- Dining Chair Cleaning
- Villa Deep Cleaning
- Apartment Cleaning
- Office Cleaning
- Restaurant & Kitchen Cleaning
- Marble Polishing & Restoration

## Coverage Areas
- Dubai (Marina, Downtown, Jumeirah, Deira, Business Bay, Silicon Oasis, International City)
- Abu Dhabi (Abu Dhabi City, Al Ain, Khalifa City, Yas Island)
- Sharjah (Sharjah City, Al Nahda, Al Qasimia, Al Majaz, Al Khan)
- Ajman (Ajman City, Al Nuaimiya, Al Rashidiya)
- Ras Al Khaimah / RAK (RAK City, Al Hamra, Al Nakheel)
- Umm Al Quwain / UAQ (UAQ City, Falaj Al Mualla)
- Fujairah (Fujairah City, Dibba Al-Fujairah, Kalba)

## Business Hours
Monday - Sunday: 8:00 AM - 10:00 PM
Available for same-day and emergency services

## Key Features
- Professional trained and certified staff
- Eco-friendly cleaning products safe for kids and pets
- Modern equipment and advanced techniques
- Same-day service available across all UAE Emirates
- 100% satisfaction guarantee — we return if you are not happy
- Affordable and transparent pricing with no hidden charges
- Licensed and insured company operating across UAE
- 5+ years of experience in residential and commercial cleaning

## Service Highlights
Al Haya Cleaning Services follows international cleaning standards with state-of-the-art equipment and trained professionals. We serve residential and commercial clients across all seven Emirates of UAE with a commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction.

## Popular Services
1. Villa Deep Cleaning — Comprehensive move-in/move-out cleaning for entire villas
2. Sofa Steam Cleaning — Professional hot-water extraction for all fabric types
3. Carpet Cleaning — Deep clean for wall-to-wall carpets, rugs, and Persian carpets
4. Marble Floor Polishing — Diamond-pad restoration to factory shine
5. Office Sanitization — Commercial space cleaning with flexible scheduling
6. Mattress Deep Cleaning — UV sanitization and allergen removal for healthier sleep
7. Curtain Cleaning — On-site steam or take-away service for all curtain types
8. Car Interior Detailing — Full interior deep clean at your location

## Why Choose Al Haya
- Same-day service available across all 7 UAE Emirates
- Transparent pricing with no hidden charges
- 100% satisfaction guarantee
- Eco-friendly products safe for children and pets
- Insured and background-checked professional staff
- Free quotes via WhatsApp in minutes
- Over 500 happy residential and commercial clients served
